subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the hem of grandeur! The fragrance which arose from the garden of the heart of that steadfast believer in God hath reached Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بذیل کبریاء نفحه که از حدیقه قلب آن موقن بالله برخواسته بود بمشام
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
